body:
```
ergothioneine biosynthetic process (GO:0052699) [2 direct EXP]
|__ergothioneine biosynthesis from histidine via gamma-glutamyl-hercynylcysteine sulfoxide (GO:0052704) [4 EXP] [only in bacteria]
|__ergothioneine biosynthesis from histidine via hercynylcysteine sulfoxide synthase (GO:0140479) [0 EXP][only in Fungi]
```

id: GO:0052699
name: ergothioneine biosynthetic process
def: "The chemical reactions and pathways resulting in the formation of ergothioneine, a naturally occurring metabolite of histidine with antioxidant properties." [Wikipedia:Ergothioneine]
intersection_of: GO:0009058 ! biosynthetic process
intersection_of: has_primary_output CHEBI:134344 ! ergothioneine(1+)

id: GO:0052704
name: ergothioneine biosynthesis from histidine via gamma-glutamyl-hercynylcysteine sulfoxide
def: "The pathway resulting in the formation of ergothioneine from histidine via a set of steps in which gamma-glutamyl-hercynylcysteine sulfoxide is formed as an intermediate." [PMID:4276459, PMID:5484456]
is_a: GO:0052699 ! ergothioneine biosynthetic process

id: GO:0140479
name: ergothioneine biosynthesis from histidine via hercynylcysteine sulfoxide synthase
def: "A biosynthetic process that results in the formation of ergothioneine from histidine via a set of steps including the hercynylcysteine sulfoxide synthase reaction, which converts N-alpha,N-alpha,N-alpha-trimethyl-L-histidine directly to hercynylcysteine sulfoxide." [PMID:22209968, PMID:24828577]
is_a: GO:0052699 ! ergothioneine biosynthetic process


The child terms map to these two MetaCyc variant pathways:
ergothioneine biosynthesis I (bacteria) (PWY-7255) = GO:0052704
ergothioneine biosynthesis II (fungi) () (PWY-7550) = GO:0140479

So, these could be added as exactMatch xrefs to the two child terms.

However, these specific variant pathways are really beyond scope of GO (they can be represented as GO-CAMs if necessary) so it would be better to obsolete the two child terms (replaced by the GO:0052699 parent term) and add the two MetaCyc xrefs as narrowMatch to GO:0052699. 

(This was noted previously in https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/11163)
title: Obsoletion request: ergothioneine biosynthetic process terms
